testing.notes: Deep review: 99 tests, good coverage but DB roundtrip and reviewer modules untested

lint.notes: Code quality: good naming/consistency, broken-check fallback should be 0.5 not 0.0, classify_status unused

documentation.notes: Exceptional README, QUICKSTART, ARCHITECTURE, STANDARDS. Best-in-class.

packaging.notes: Zero mandatory deps, complete pyproject.toml, py.typed, classifiers correct

security.notes: Sidecar path traversal logs-and-continues, os.chdir not thread-safe, provider api_key in plain attr

type_coverage.notes: Thorough annotations, from __future__ everywhere, but some untyped params in dashboard/db

ci.notes: CI on 4 matrix jobs, auto-publish via trusted publisher, lint+test steps
